chunks.text_preview: Screen function-key dispatch facts for PDCBVC.CBL: - BROWSE-FASE1: COLLABORATORI IN CORSO)' TO TWCOB-AREA-MSG GO TO XCTL-LIV4 END-IF END-IF PERFORM PREP-LINK-PD1FS00 THRU PREP-LINK-PD1FS00-EXIT. - BROWSE-FASE1: SKIP1 IF PD1VOCI-TABVOX-NUMERO = 0 AND TWCOB-XCTL-PGM = 'PDCGVC' THEN MOVE SPACES TO TWCOB-AREA-MSG GO TO XCTL-LIV4. - BROWSE-FASE1: SKIP1 IF PD1VOCI-TABVOX-NUMERO = 0 THEN MOVE WKMSG TO TWCOB-AREA-MSG GO TO XCTL-LIV4. - BROWSE-FASE2: IF EIBAID = DFHPF1 THEN GO TO XCTL-LIV1. - BROWSE-FASE2: IF EIBAID = DFHPF2 THEN GO TO XCTL-LIV2. - BROWSE-FASE2: IF EIBAID = DFHPF3 THEN GO TO XCTL-LIV3. - BROWSE-FASE2: IF EIBAID = DFHPF4 THEN GO TO XCTL-LIV4. - BROWSE-FASE2: IF EIBAID = DFHPF9 THEN GO TO XCTL-LIV0. - BROWSE-FASE2: IF EIBAID = DFHPF7 THEN GO TO BROWSE-FASE2-PF7. - BROWSE-FASE2: IF EIBAID = DFHPF8 THEN GO TO BROWSE-FASE2-PF8. - BROWSE-FASE2-ENTER: IF WCTPAG NOT LESS NPAGT THEN GO TO XCTL-LIV4. - BROWSE-FASE2-SEL-20: GO TO XCTL-LIV5. - XCTL-LIV1: XCTL-LIV1. - XCTL-LIV1: MOVE '1' TO TWCOB-FASE. - XCTL-LIV1: MOVE '1' TO TWCOB-FUNZIONE.

Screen function-key dispatch facts for PDCBVC.CBL: (continued): - XCTL-LIV1: MOVE PROG-LIV1 TO TWCOB-NOME-PGM. - XCTL-LIV1: PERFORM RESET-TWA THRU RESET-TWA-EXIT. - XCTL-LIV1: GO TO XCTL-MAIN. - XCTL-LIV2: XCTL-LIV2. - XCTL-LIV2: MOVE '1' TO TWCOB-FASE. - XCTL-LIV2: MOVE '1' TO TWCOB-FUNZIONE. - XCTL-LIV2: MOVE PROG-LIV2 TO TWCOB-NOME-PGM. - XCTL-LIV2: MOVE SPACES TO TWCOB-VARCONT-VOCE PERFORM RESET-TWA THRU RESET-TWA-EXIT. - XCTL-LIV2: GO TO XCTL-MAIN. - XCTL-LIV3: XCTL-LIV3. - XCTL-LIV3: MOVE '1' TO TWCOB-FASE. - XCTL-LIV3: MOVE '1' TO TWCOB-FUNZIONE. - XCTL-LIV3: MOVE PROG-LIV3 TO TWCOB-NOME-PGM. - XCTL-LIV3: PERFORM RESET-TWA THRU RESET-TWA-EXIT. - XCTL-LIV3: GO TO XCTL-MAIN. - XCTL-LIV4: XCTL-LIV4. - XCTL-LIV4: MOVE '1' TO TWCOB-FASE. - XCTL-LIV4: MOVE '1' TO TWCOB-FUNZIONE. - XCTL-LIV4: MOVE PROG-LIV4 TO TWCOB-NOME-PGM. - XCTL-LIV4: MOVE SPACES TO TWCOB-VARCONT-VOCE PERFORM RESET-TWA THRU RESET-TWA-EXIT. - XCTL-LIV4: GO TO XCTL-MAIN. - XCTL-LIV5: XCTL-LIV5. - XCTL-LIV5: MOVE '1' TO TWCOB-FASE. - XCTL-LIV5: MOVE PROG-LIV5 TO TWCOB-NOME-PGM. - XCTL-LIV5: PERFORM RESET-TWA THRU RESET-TWA-EXIT.

Screen pagination facts for PDCBVC.CBL: - BROWSE-FASE1: PERFORM CALCOLA-NPAG THRU CALCOLA-NPAG-EXIT. - BROWSE-FASE2: MOVE TWCOB-VARCONT-NPAGINA TO WCTPAG. - BROWSE-FASE2: IF EIBAID = DFHENTER THEN GO TO BROWSE-FASE2-ENTER. - BROWSE-FASE2: IF EIBAID = DFHPF7 THEN GO TO BROWSE-FASE2-PF7. - BROWSE-FASE2: IF EIBAID = DFHPF8 THEN GO TO BROWSE-FASE2-PF8. - BROWSE-FASE2-ENTER: BROWSE-FASE2-ENTER. - BROWSE-FASE2-ENTER: IF SCELTAI NOT = '__' AND SCELTAI NOT = SPACES THEN GO TO BROWSE-FASE2-SEL. - BROWSE-FASE2-ENTER: SKIP1 PERFORM PREP-LINK-PD1FS00 THRU PREP-LINK-PD1FS00-EXIT. - BROWSE-FASE2-ENTER: PERFORM INIZ-PARAM THRU INIZ-PARAM-EXIT. - BROWSE-FASE2-ENTER: PERFORM LINK-PD1VOCI THRU LINK-PD1VOCI-EXIT. - BROWSE-FASE2-ENTER: PERFORM CALCOLA-NPAG THRU CALCOLA-NPAG-EXIT. - BROWSE-FASE2-ENTER: IF WCTPAG NOT LESS NPAGT THEN GO TO XCTL-LIV4. - BROWSE-FASE2-ENTER: SKIP1 GO TO BROWSE-FASE2-VISUAL. - BROWSE-FASE2-PF7: BROWSE-FASE2-PF7. - BROWSE-FASE2-PF7: IF WCTPAG NOT GREATER 1 THEN GO TO BROWSE-FASE2-TASTOER. - BROWSE-FASE2-PF7: SUBTRACT 2 FROM WCTPAG. - BROWSE-FASE2-PF7: GO TO BROWSE-FASE2-ENTER.
